evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: No velocity or rigour signal phrases appear in the JD; responsibilities focus generically on data preparation and visualisation without emphasising speed or quality governance, yielding mixed by default.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Bitac is a BI consulting firm serving companies across various industries with no financial reporting, compliance, or regulatory language, placing domain risk at moderate.
evidence.data_team_maturity: hat sich auf Business Intelligence Lösungen im Microsoft Umfeld spezialisiert
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Bitac was founded in 2014 with an established Microsoft BI practice serving named clients, suggesting a mid-maturity team rather than an early-stage function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Du bist als Business Intelligence Spezialist für die Aufbereitung und Analyse von Daten zuständig. Du erarbeitest zusammen mit den Fachbereichen und der IT-Datenextraktion Szenarien aus und setzt diese um.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The single-paragraph responsibilities section is entirely generic boilerplate — 'data preparation', 'connect data sources', 'create visualisations' — with no named tools, scale numbers, or methodology specifics, consistent with recruiter authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Du erarbeitest zusammen mit den Fachbereichen und der IT-Datenextraktion Szenarien aus
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role serves internal business departments and IT as data consumers, with no commercial, product, or finance emphasis, pointing to internal_data orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Despite ownership verbs like 'zuständig' and 'verantwortlich', the framing is execution-oriented — the role implements scenarios defined with departments rather than setting strategy.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: verschiedenen Datenquellen anzubinden, aufzubereiten und für die Visualisierung vorzubereiten
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Consulting context implies both building new client solutions and extending existing ones, with no dominant signal favouring either purely greenfield or fix/scale.
evidence.language_gate: Remote (Deutschland) — JD written entirely in German with no English option stated

ai_role_quote: Business Intelligence Lösungen im Microsoft Umfeld spezialisiert
ai_role_reasoning: Standard BI specialist role with traditional data prep and visualization; no AI tools, GenAI responsibilities, or AI-ready infrastructure mentioned.
testing_framing_quote: The single-paragraph responsibilities section is entirely generic boilerplate — 'data preparation', 'connect data sources', 'create visualisations'
testing_framing_reasoning: No testing ownership, quality governance, or data contract language; execution-oriented responsibilities without methodology specifics.
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: JD emphasizes delivery for internal departments; no compliance, regulatory, SLO, incident prevention, or stakeholder risk language.
